data_source: GitHub Discussions (GraphQL API not available via MCP — partial data)
note: Discussion data requires GraphQL API access. This file is a skeleton pending Conductor/Actions integration with full GraphQL token.
action_items: Configure GraphQL token in Conductor/GitHub Actions to enable discussion data fetch
Run: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner:"CherryHQ",name:"cherry-studio") { discussions(first:100) { nodes { number title createdAt updatedAt answer { author { login } } } } } }'
